zh.lifeSummary: 當Reynold de Lucy於1137年出生在英國波藍德時，他的父親William de Lucy11歲，母親Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy17歲。他於1162年之前與Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1198年1月11日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reynold de Lucy于1137年出生在英国波藍德时，他的父亲William de Lucy11岁，母亲Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy17岁。他于1162年之前与Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1198年1月11日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Reynold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Reinald, Reynaud, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + wald ‘ruler’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them into England. In modern use, the given name sometimes represents a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman personal name.

en.lifeSummary: When Reynold de Lucy was born in 1137, in Cumberland, England, his father, William de Lucy, was 11 and his mother, Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy, was 17. He married Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland before 1162. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 11 January 1198, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reynold de Lucy est né en 1137, à Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, William de Lucy, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland avant 1162. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 janvier 1198, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reynold de Lucy 1137 in Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Lucy 11 und seine Mutter Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy 17. Er hat vor 1162 Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. Januar 1198 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold de Lucy è nato il nel 1137 nel Cumberland, England, il suo padre, William de Lucy, aveva 11 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland prima del 1162. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 gennaio 1198, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Reynold de Lucyが1137年にイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父William de Lucyは11歳，母Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucyは17歳であった。1162年以前にAmabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1198年1月11日に故郷で61歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reynold de Lucy(이)가 1137년 영국 c벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Lucy(은)는 11세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1162년 이전 Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1198년 1월 11일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold de Lucy nasceu em 1137, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Lucy, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland antes 1162. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1198, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reynold de Lucy родился в 1137 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Lucy было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland перед 1162 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 11 января 1198 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reynold de Lucy nació en 1137, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Lucy, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Cecilia MdNmUnk Lucy, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Amabel FitzWilliam Lady of Copeland antes de 1162. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de enero de 1198, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
